01
Phase 1
Tokyo Round 1
Aug 15–16 · France · Shuan · Alvin · Steven
SAT15
Arrival
NRT → Ikebukuro → Airbnb
Tokyo ▾
Afternoon
JL 57 · SFO → NRT · Land ~4:30 PM JST · NRT T2

Buy Suica IC cards at airport. N'EX → Ikebukuro (~85 min, ¥3,070) → Yamanote Line to Sugamo (2 stops, 4 min). Pre-book N'EX reserved seats before departure.

Evening
Check in AirbnbBooked

5-chōme-45-8 Sugamo, Toshima City

Dinner
Ramen Gojuban — arrival dinner

2 km from Airbnb, Ikebukuro area. ramen_beast top 10 2025 — Niigata-style miso ramen, rich and deeply seasoned. Sells out early — if closed, check Tabelog for late-night options near Sugamo/Ikebukuro.

SUN16
Tokyo Day 1
Harajuku · Asakusa · Shinjuku
Tokyo ▾
Morning
Meiji Shrine → Harajuku → Omotesando

Harajuku Gyozarou for gyoza. KOFFEE MAMEYA (Omotesando — specialty pour-over, no seats, quick stop). Higuma Doughnuts × Coffee Wrights (opens 11 AM, closed Wednesdays).

Afternoon
Shibuya Scramble → Senso-ji / Asakusa → Nakamise → Akihabara

Kibidango Azuma (street snack) + Kamejuu (traditional sweets) in Asakusa.

Evening
Sushi Keita

https://tabelog.com/en/tokyo/A1313/A131301/13213360/

02
Phase 2
Gotemba · Fuji · Hakone
Aug 17–20 · France · Shuan · Alvin · Steven
MON17
Drive to Gotemba
Gotemba · Costco Zama · Outlets
Drive ▾
Morning
Pick up car · Sixt ShibuyaBooked

10-4 Udagawacho, Shibuya-ku
Take taxi or ~50 min by train — leave early. Confirm ETC card included.

En Route
Costco Zama — Zama City, Kanagawa

~40 min from Ikebukuro via Tomei Expressway, right off the highway. Opens 10 AM weekdays. Load up on snacks, drinks, and supplies for the Fuji/Hakone stretch.

Afternoon
Check in Airbnb · Shop at Gotemba Outlets

On-site gravel driveway parking.
List of shops: https://www.premiumoutlets.co.jp/en/gotemba/brands/?tab=1

Dinner
Sawayaka — Genkotsu Hamburg Steak

Shizuoka-only chain. 100% beef, charcoal-grilled, finished at your table. Get a ticket on arrival, shop outlets while waiting. Monday = no weekend wait.

TUE18
Fun2Drive — Ultimate Hakone Drive
Hakone Skyline · Ashinoko Skyline · Turnpike
Drive ▾
All Day
Fun2Drive "Ultimate Hakone Drive"Booked

4.5 hrs · ¥59,980/car (insurance, guide fee, tax included; gas + tolls extra). Guided convoy on the Initial D / MF Ghost roads.

Check-In
Arrive 9-9:30AM · Drive starts 10am until 2:30pm

Cash for remaining balance + tolls (cash only). Credit card for security deposit (remove international restrictions). Original passport + home driver's license + original IDP physical document. Membership registration ≥24 hrs before start — do Aug 15 or 16.

Evening
Explore Gotemba · Dinner at Tonkatsu Hajimari

Omakase Course (¥5,500) – Appetizer, assorted vegetable and seafood fritters 4 pieces of pork cutlet (total 140g)

WED19
Mt. Fuji Summit Hike
Yoshida Trail · Day Hike · Fujisan Parking → 5th Station
Fuji ▾
3:15 AM
Leave Airbnb

~30 min drive to Fujisan Parking Lot. Depart ~3:15AM, arrive by 3:45AM to queue for first shuttle.

4:00 AM
First shuttle — ¥3,000 round trip (pre-buy via Jorudan)

~45 min to 5th Station. First bus fills fast — arrive early to queue.

4:45 AM
5th Station · Gate + ¥4,000/person fee · Gear check

Reserve slot at fujisan-climb.jp (opens May/Jun 2026). Proper hiking boots mandatory. Gate closes 2 PM for non-hut guests.

Summit
~6 hrs ascent · ~4 hrs descent

Headlamps, warm layers (summit ~5°C), snacks, water. Wide margin before 2 PM closure with 4:45 AM start.

Evening
Return to 1929 Niihashi · Final night in Gotemba

Rest, eat whatever is easy, early night. Checkout tomorrow morning before Hakone.

THU20
Hakone Day Trip
Day Trip + Onsen OR Yugawara + Ramen Iida Shoten
Hakone ▾
Morning
Check out Airbnb · Optional: Kirin Distillery / Toraya Kobo

If doing Kirin (10:30 AM tour, ~15 min from Airbnb): book standard tour (¥500) in advance. Hakone Open-Air Museum is ~25 min from the Airbnb.

All Day
Day Trip + Onsen OR Yugawara / Ramen Iidea Shoten

Highly depends on if we get reservations to Ramen Iida Shoten. If not, we go onsen.

Evening
Drive back to Tokyo Airbnb

Dinner in Hakone town before departing. Hakone → Sugamo via Tomei Expressway ~2 hrs. James departs SFO on NH 107 tonight — lands HND tomorrow morning.

03
Phase 3
Tokyo Round 2
Aug 21–27 · Full group assembled
Fri21
Assembly — James Arrives
Sugamo · Ikebukuro · Home base · Recovery
▾
Recovery day after Phase 2. Keep it flexible and local — don't push distance. James just flew in from SFO, the rest of you are coming off Fuji and Hakone.
Food & drink — near base
Ramen Gojuban
2 km from Airbnb. ramen_beast top 10, Niigata-style miso. Arrival bowl or last-day repeat.
Tonkatsu Tonta
Solid tonkatsu, Ikebukuro area. Fallback if Gojuban is sold out early.
Kisaburō Nōjō
Egg farm restaurant, Komagome — one stop from Sugamo. Good brunch once James lands.
Iyoshi Cola Honten
Craft cola flagship, Shimo-Ochiai. Easy detour from Sugamo base.
Unagi Hashimoto
Michelin-listed unagi, Edo-style counter prep. Ueno area — doable for dinner if the group wants to go out.
Activities
Round One Ikebukuro
Arcade, bowling, batting, billiards. Ikebukuro, open late. Good low-stakes group activity.
Kabukicho wander
Shinjuku nightlife. Light wander — easy to bail when jet lag hits.
Sat22
South Arc
Daikanyama · Nakameguro · Omotesando · Harajuku · Azabu · Roppongi
▾
Dinner - Sushisho Masa — 9:00 PMBooked · 5 ppl
High-end omakase · Minami-Aoyama · 15 min taxi from Nakameguro
Flow: Daikanyama (Kapital cluster, brunch) → Nakameguro canal walk + Onibus → Harajuku/Omotesando (Koffee Mameya, NUIR, street snacks) → drift south toward Roppongi/Azabu (teamLab or pickleball if booked, KAPITAL Legs, Kotaro/SAVOY optional) → taxi to Minami-Aoyama for Sushisho 9 PM.
Shopping
Daikanyama
Kapital Daikanyama
Main store. Best Kapital concentration in Tokyo.
duffle with kapital
Next door to Kapital Daikanyama.
Kapital Legs Daikanyama
Same block — all three within steps.
Omotesando / Shibuya
NUIR
Select vintage and contemporary, near Omotesando.
CASANOVA Vintage Ginza
High-grade vintage, Ginza — if swinging east.
Roppongi / Azabu
KAPITAL Legs Roppongi
Roppongi branch, on the way south toward Azabu-Juban.
Coffee
Onibus Coffee Nakameguro
Best coffee in Nakameguro, canal-side, hand-drip single-origin.
Koffee Mameya Omotesando
Specialty pour-over, no seats, quick stand-and-drink stop.
Rec Coffee Shibuya East
Specialty coffee, east Shibuya. On the way between neighborhoods.
Food
Harajuku / Daikanyama
Harajuku Gyozarou
Classic gyoza, Harajuku. Reliable and fast lunch.
Henry's Burger Daikanyama
Smash burger, same Daikanyama cluster as Kapital.
Wagyumafia Cutlet Sandwich
Wagyu katsu sando ¥3,500, Daikanyama.
DE FRITES STAAN Harajuku
Belgian frites, Harajuku — afternoon street snack.
Iyoshi Cola Harajuku
Craft cola, Harajuku. Pairs with the frites.
Tamago Gurashi
Egg-focused cafe, Harajuku/Omotesando area.
Omotesando / Azabu area
Aji no Nakamura
Old-school ramen, Minami-Aoyama area. Near Sushisho Masa.
Menya Sign
Ramen, Hiroo — south edge of the day.
KotaroCall 1 PM JST
Best premium izakaya in Tokyo, Omotesando. 30-day window, call daily.
Komiyama-nishiazabuReserve
Omi wagyu omakase counter, Nishi-Azabu.
SAVOY Azabujuban
Legendary Neapolitan pizza, 2 types only, no reservation. Good post-Sushisho late stop.
Los Tacos Azules
Tacos, Sangenjaya. If you push further south of Azabu.
Activities
Tokyo Tower Pickleball
Rooftop courts at Tokyo Tower FootTown. Book via reserva.be — afternoon slot before Sushisho.
Nonbei Yokocho
Shibuya lantern-lit yakitori alley. Good post-Sushisho nightcap street.
Sun23
Northeast Corridor
Kuramae · Asakusa · Kappabashi · Ueno · Akihabara
▾
Flow: Kuramae (Pelican + HATCOFFEE) → Asakusa (Nakamise, street snacks) → Kappabashi (Kama-Asa) → Ueno (HINOYA/AMERICAYA, lunch) → Akihabara (batting cages, night wander). All walkable or one stop on the Ginza/Asakusa Line from Sugamo.
Coffee & bakeries — morning
Pelican Café
Old-school bakery, Kuramae. Opens early — morning bread before the day starts.
HATCOFFEE
Specialty coffee, Kiyosumi/Kuramae area. Pair these two for a proper start.
Food — Asakusa → Ueno
Asakusa
Kibidango Azuma
Mochi skewers, Nakamise — quintessential Asakusa street snack.
Kamejuu
Traditional wagashi sweets shop, Asakusa strip.
Ueno
Tensuzu
Bib Gourmand tempura, founded 1928, no reservation. Strong lunch anchor.
Gyukatsu Motomura
Beef katsu cooked rare on a hot stone at the table, ~¥1,500. Ueno.
Kanazawa Maimon Sushi
Kanazawa-style sushi, Ueno. Lunch alt if tempura is too long a wait.
Evening
Unagi Hashimoto
Michelin-listed unagi, Edo-style counter. Ueno area — solid evening anchor if not done Aug 21.
The Pizza Bar on 38th
Rooftop pizza bar, Nihonbashi — south end of the corridor, good evening choice.
Shopping
Kappabashi
Kama-Asa KnivesCheck Sun hrs
Founded 1908, 1,000+ knives, English staff. Bring passport for tax-free.
Ueno
HINOYA
Vintage workwear, Ueno. Heavy denim, chore coats, western.
AMERICAYA
Same block as HINOYA — hit both together.
Activities
Active Akiba Batting Center
Multiple cage types, late night. Akihabara — add an Akiba wander after dark.
Mon24
East-South Corridor
Toyosu · Tsukiji · Ginza · Nihonbashi · Iidabashi
▾
Breakfast - Sushi DaiQueue 4:15 AM
Bib Gourmand omakase · ~¥5,500 · cash only
Dinner - Wagyu Tobiuishi Iidabashi
All-private-room wagyu yakiniku, ¥8–9k/person. Iidabashi — short ride from Ginza.
Flow: 4:15 AM Toyosu queue → Sushi Dai done ~8 AM → Tsukiji wander → Ginza corridor at leisure (coffee, shopping, shaved ice, lunch queue) → afternoon activities or nap → evening anchor. Early start earns a built-in rest window.
Food — post-Sushi Dai morning
Tsukiji Outer Market
10-min subway from Toyosu. Post-sushi wander — tamagoyaki, seafood skewers, tamago sandos.
Centre The Bakery
Acclaimed toast specialist, Ginza. Good second breakfast after Tsukiji.
Coffee — Ginza
Cafe de l'ambre
Legendary kissaten since 1948, aged single-origin beans. Coffee only, Ginza institution.
Glitch Coffee Ginza
Specialty coffee roaster, Ginza.
BONGENCOFFEE Ginza
Specialty coffee, Ginza.
Food — Ginza / Nihonbashi afternoon
Ginza Kagari
Michelin chicken paitan ramen, arrive early for lunch queue.
Miko Sushi Ginza
Ginza sushi, lunchtime option.
Wabi Sabi DX
Japanese fusion, Ginza/Tsukiji edge.
Parlor Vinefru shave ice
Shaved ice, Ginza. August heat — midday cooldown.
The Pizza Bar on 38th
Rooftop pizza bar, Nihonbashi. Evening option if not done Aug 23.
400°C Pizza Tokyo
Neapolitan pizza, Iidabashi/Kudanshita area.
Shopping — Ginza
Kapital Ginza
Ginza flagship — if skipped on the 22nd.
CASANOVA Vintage Ginza
High-grade vintage, right by the coffee cluster.
Activities & evening picks
Tokyo Tower Pickleball
Rooftop courts at Tokyo Tower FootTown, ~2.7 km from Ginza. Book via reserva.be. Early start = afternoon energy.
Tue25
West Arc
Koenji · Nishi-Ogikubo · Nakano · Shimokitazawa · Hatagaya · Sangenjaya
▾
Flow: JR Chuo from Sugamo → Nakano (Whistler) → Koenji (vintage strip + curry) → Nishi-Ogikubo (A Tes Souhaits) → back to Shinjuku → Odakyu/Keio south to Shimokita (Ogawa Coffee, vintage cluster, Hitosuji ramen) → walk to Hatagaya (Blue Lug) → bus to Sangenjaya for Narikura evening.
Food & coffee — JR Chuo corridor (morning)
Koenji
European Curry Tomato
European-style curry, Koenji/Nakano area. Morning fuel before the vintage walk.
Nishi-Ogikubo — 1 stop west
A Tes Souhaits
One of the best French patisseries in all of Tokyo. Don't skip this one.
Shopping — Chuo line + Shimokita
Koenji
Koenji vintage strip
Tokyo's densest pure-vintage neighborhood. Pal and Look shotengais — budget an hour with no specific targets.
Nakano — 1 stop east
Whistler
Workwear and vintage, Nakano. Easy add before heading south to Shimokita.
Shimokitazawa
reload
Multi-vendor vintage container mall, Shimokitazawa.
Bears ベアーズ
Vintage, a few blocks from reload.
Re:Re: Garden
Vintage, walkable from the other two.
Hatagaya — 10-min walk from Shimokita
Blue Lug Hatagaya
Best custom bike shop in Tokyo. Worth the detour even just to look.
Coffee — Shimokita area
Ogawa Coffee Laboratory
Best coffee in Shimokitazawa. Start the Shimokita block here.
Cafe Viet Arco
Vietnamese coffee, Shimokitazawa. Light afternoon stop.
Et Cultural Coffeehouse
Independent coffeehouse, walkable from the vintage cluster.
Murrma Coffee
Quality coffee, Tomigaya area — eastern edge of the day.
Path
Natural wine + food, Tomigaya/Yoyogi. Good wind-down if you push toward Shinjuku.
Food — Shimokita + Sangenjaya
Sousakumen Hitosuji
ramen_beast #1 Japan 2025, mala-style broth, in-house noodles. In Shimokitazawa.
Rāmenya Shima
Tabelog top ramen, Shinjuku area. On the way back east if not done Aug 21.
Los Tacos Azules
Tacos, Sangenjaya — near Narikura. Pre or post-dinner bite.
Wed26
Last Day — Shinjuku · Ikebukuro · Overflow
Ramen send-off · Final dinner · Pack for HND
▾
Ramen Gojuban — morning
2 km from Airbnb · ramen_beast top 10 · Sushi Dai closed Wed ✓ already done Mon
Pack tonight. UA 876 departs HND T3 at 3:50 PM tomorrow. Sugamo → Shinagawa (Yamanote) → Keikyu → HND T3 · ~55 min · ¥880. At HND by 1:15 PM. Leave Airbnb no later than 12:30 PM.
Food — Shinjuku / Ikebukuro
Fūunji
Classic tsukemen, Shinjuku. Lunch if Gojuban is the morning move.
Azuki to Kōri
Shaved ice + azuki, Shinjuku south. August heat send-off.
400°C Pizza Tokyo
Neapolitan pizza, Iidabashi/Kudanshita. If not done Aug 24.
Tonkatsu Tonta
Ikebukuro-area tonkatsu. Overflow if Narikura didn't happen on the 25th.
Final dinner — pick one
Wagyu Tobiuishi IidabashiTabelog
All-private-room wagyu yakiniku, ¥8–9k/person. Best group send-off if not done on the 24th.
Sushi Keitaomakase.in
1 Michelin star. Last chance if not yet done.
KotaroCall 1 PM JST
Best premium izakaya in Tokyo, Omotesando. Same-day call.
Komiyama-nishiazabuReserve
Omi wagyu omakase counter. If Aug 22 didn't land it.
SAVOY Azabujuban
Neapolitan pizza, no reservation. Late, casual. If nothing else is booked.
Night
Nonbei Yokocho
Shibuya lantern-lit yakitori alley. Low-key send-off.
Round One Ikebukuro
Arcade, bowling, batting — if the group has one more run in them.
Shinjuku Batting Center
Closer option if already in Shinjuku.
Kabukicho wander
Shinjuku nightlife, one last time.
Thu27
Departure — UA 876 · HND T3 → SFO
Departs 3:50 PM JST · Arrives 9:35 AM PDT (same day)
Sugamo → Shinagawa (Yamanote) → Keikyu Line → HND T3 · ~55 min · ¥880
At HND by 1:15 PM at the latest · allow 2.5 hrs · leave Airbnb no later than 12:30 PM

Getting There

  • Aug 15 (arrival): N'EX to Ikebukuro (~85 min, ¥3,070) then Yamanote Line to Sugamo (2 stops, 4 min)
  • Aug 21 (James): Keikyu Line to Shinagawa to Yamanote to Sugamo · ~55 min · ¥660.
  • Aug 20 (return from Hakone): Drive car to Sixt Shibuya, then Yamanote to Sugamo
  • Aug 27 (departure): Sugamo to Shinagawa (Yamanote) to Keikyu to HND T3 · ~55 min · ¥880

Getting There

  • Aug 17: Drive from Sugamo via Tomei Expressway · Costco Zama stop en route · ~1.5 hrs to Gotemba · on-site gravel driveway parking
  • Aug 20: Check out morning, Hakone day trip, either onsen or Ramen Iida Shoten if we get reservations. Drive back to Tokyo that night

Location & Nearby

  • 8 min walk from Toden Shin-Koshinzuka Station (Arakawa tram line)
  • Sugamo Station (Yamanote Line) - direct to Ikebukuro, Shibuya, Shinjuku, Ueno, Akihabara
  • Round One Ikebukuro: 2 stops by train
  • Ramen Gojuban (Zoshigaya): walking distance from Airbnb
  • LUUP e-scooter ports available in Toshima ward

Nearby

  • Fun2Drive office: ~15 min drive
  • Fujisan Parking (Fuji shuttle): ~15 min drive
  • Kirin Fuji Gotemba Distillery: ~15 min drive
  • Gotemba Premium Outlets: ~10 min drive
  • Sawayaka (hamburg steak): ~10 min drive
  • Toraya Kobo: ~10 min drive

Need to Know

Trail Rules
Mt. Fuji — Yoshida Trail (Aug 19)
  • First shuttle from Fujisan Parking: 4:00 AM, arrives 5th Station 4:45 AM. Arrive parking by 3:45 AM to queue.
  • Gate closes 2 PM for climbers without mountain hut reservations. 4:45 AM start gives a wide margin.
  • Rangers conduct mandatory gear checks. No sneakers or sandals — proper hiking boots required for all four.
  • Trail capped at 4,000 climbers/day. 1,000 slots released daily at midnight JST. Book at fujisan-climb.jp the moment 2026 season opens (May/June).
  • Summit temperature ~5°C in August. Bring layers, headlamps, snacks, plenty of water.
  • Gate fee ¥4,000/person — pre-pay online with reservation or pay cash at gate.
Gear List
Mt. Fuji — Packing List
  • Mandatory: hiking boots (rangers turn you around), headlamp + spare batteries, warm layers, rain jacket
  • Strongly recommended: trekking poles (rental at 5th Station ~¥500), gloves, buff/neck gaiter, onigiri + energy gels, 2L water
  • At 5th Station: last chance to rent/buy gear, use a proper toilet, eat. Don't skip this stop.
  • Mountain huts sell hot food, drinks, oxygen cans (~¥1,500). Altitude sickness is real — descend immediately if severe nausea hits.
  • Sunrise Aug 19: ~5:00 AM at summit. With a 4:45 AM start and ~6 hr ascent, you won't catch sunrise at the top. Views are excellent in full daylight.
Road Trip
Driving Leg — France, Shuan, Alvin, Steven
  • Rental: Sixt · 1 car · Aug 17–21 · Shibuya Udagawacho branch · confirm ETC card included
  • Drive on the left. Steering wheel on right. Speed limits: 100 km/h expressways, 60 km/h regular roads.
  • ETC lanes: stay in ETC-marked lanes at toll booths — card is automatic. Never enter cash-only lanes.
  • Ashigara SA on the Tomei near Gotemba is worth a stop. Costco Zama opens 10 AM weekdays.
  • Accident: call 110 (police) + 119 (ambulance). Do not move the car. Sixt emergency number is in rental docs.
  • Return car Aug 21 morning at Shibuya Udagawacho. City parking is ¥500–1,000/hr — unnecessary.
Arrival
James — Arrival Aug 21 (NH 107)
  • Flight: NH 107 SFO to HND (Haneda) Terminal 3 — not NRT. Departs Aug 20 night, lands HND morning Aug 21.
  • From HND T3: Keikyu Line to Shinagawa (~13 min, ¥330) → Yamanote to Sugamo (~25 min) → 7–9 min walk. Total ~55 min, ¥660.
  • Send James the Airbnb address (5-chome-45-8 Sugamo, Toshima City) and entry code before departure.
  • Buy Suica IC card at HND T3 arrivals — tap on/off all trains, no individual tickets needed.
  • Restaurant reservations Aug 22+ are already booked for 5 people.
Transport
LUUP — E-Scooter Sharing
  • Register before arriving — ~10 min, requires passport upload + credit card. No driver's license. Must pass in-app safety test (retriable).
  • Pricing: ¥50 unlock + ¥15/min · 10 min ride ~¥200
  • Ports: 7,900+ across Tokyo. Select return port in app before riding. Park inside white LUUP rectangle + photo to end ride.
  • Rules: left side / bike lanes only · no sidewalks above 6 km/h · no phone, earphones, passengers · max 20 km/h
  • Best hops: Shimokita → Omotesando · Ginza → Azabu · Shibuya → Daikanyama · late night when trains stop
Essentials
Tokyo Essentials
  • Suica IC card: buy at NRT/HND on arrival. Tap on/off trains, buses, convenience stores, vending machines.
  • Cash: Japan is heavily cash-based. Sushi Dai, Golden Gai bars, ramen shops are cash only. 7-Eleven ATMs accept foreign cards. Carry ¥10,000+.
  • Google Maps: works perfectly for transit. Download Tokyo offline map before leaving wifi.
  • Tipping: never tip in Japan. Exceptional service is the standard.
  • Last trains: Yamanote runs until ~12:30–1:00 AM. After that: taxi (GO app) or LUUP.
  • Weather Aug: 89–96°F, high humidity. Start days early, stay hydrated, convenience stores have cold towels.
  • Obon ends Aug 16 — crowds ease significantly once you hit the road Aug 17.
Nightlife
Golden Gai — Shinjuku
  • 200+ bars across 6 narrow alleys. Each seats 4–10 max. With 5 of you, you'll often take over the whole bar.
  • Cover charges: ¥500–1,500/person, usually includes a small snack (otoshi). Budget ¥2,000–3,000/bar.
  • Cash only. Best atmosphere 9 PM–1 AM. Walk all six alleys first before committing to a bar.
  • Start at Albatross — 3 narrow floors, rooftop terrace, English-speaking staff, no cover. Best warm-up spot.
  • Worth finding: Deathmatch in Hell · La Jetée (film-themed) · The Open Book · Golden Gai red.
  • Some bars are members-only — if unwelcoming, move on. Many love visitors.
Activity
Tokyo Tower Pickleball
  • Rooftop pickleball courts at Tokyo Tower FootTown RF — opened July 2025, one of the most unique setups in Tokyo.
  • Court rental by time slot — must book the whole court. Paddles and balls free to borrow at reception.
  • Book via reserva.be/tokyotowerpickleball · full details at tokyotower-pickleball.jp
  • 4-2-8 Shibakoen, Minato City — 10 min from Ginza, 5 min from Azabu. Fits the Aug 23 Ginza/Azabu day or Aug 26 morning.
  • Best for 4 players — group of 5 can rotate or split into singles/doubles.
